globalSecurity.transport: HTTPS only; TLS 1.2 minimum; TLS 1.3 preferred
globalSecurity.idempotency: Idempotency-Key header for all financial POST operations
globalSecurity.dataClassification: Responses contain no Restricted data (PAN, CVV, full SSN); Confidential data masked

apis.description: Retrieves the current available balance, ledger balance, and hold amount for the specified account. Only accessible by the account owner.

security: Resource-level authorization: only account owner can access

Authenticated but not authorized for this resource

apis.description: Initiates a domestic fund transfer from the authenticated customer's account to a registered beneficiary. Requires step-up MFA. Subject to daily transfer limits and real-time fraud screening.
